executives.name: Drew Zimmerman
executives.background: Mr. Zimmerman has over 15 years of experience in the financial services and resource sectors. He previously served as a derivatives trader and has been involved in various capacities with public resource companies.

executives.name: Jay Shrewder
executives.background: Mr. Shrewder is a Chartered Professional Accountant with extensive experience in financial reporting and corporate finance for junior exploration companies.

executives.name: Darren Hazelwood
executives.background: Mr. Hazelwood has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, focusing on project management and corporate development.

board_of_directors.name: Drew Zimmerman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Zimmerman is the CEO of the company and has a background in derivatives trading and resource sector finance.

board_of_directors.name: Bill Sheriff
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sheriff is a seasoned mining executive with over 30 years of experience. He was the founder and Chairman of Energy Metals Corp. and has held numerous board positions in the uranium sector.

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Roman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Roman is a prominent figure in the Canadian mining industry, having led several successful resource companies, including Global Atomic Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Graham Downs
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Downs has over 25 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry and is currently the CEO of Cascadia Minerals Ltd.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Board Team Page
